steps.title: Identify the total number of animals
steps.content: The pet service cares for both cats and dogs. The total number of animals is the sum of both: $c + d$.

steps.title: Translate at most 43 to an inequality
steps.content:
The phrase at most 43 animals means the total cannot exceed 43. The inequality symbol for at most is $\le$. Therefore, the total number of animals satisfies: $$c + d \le 43$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
